function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a file from the codebase. Paths are relative to the codebase root shown in the project structure.

path.description: File path relative to codebase root.

line_end.description: End line (1-indexed). Omit for end of file.

function.name: search
function.description: Grep for a regex pattern across files. Returns matching lines with paths and line numbers.
